current_usage_location: Odds API is used in sports_bot_v2/sports/mlb/sharp_odds.py for verification/cross-book sharp-odds input, not in the realtime dashboard SSE path.

tracking_and_existing_enforcement.evidence: Live log evidence showed odds_budget: daily limit 600 reached, and .env sets MAX_ODDS_CALLS_PER_DAY=600.

modes.normal: Calls allowed subject to daily cap
modes.soft_throttle: After 18000/month target, skip non-essential fetches using ODDS_SOFT_THROTTLE_MOD

what_happens_when_cap_is_hit.daily_600: Odds fetch returns False / skips non-essential fetch for rest of day
what_happens_when_cap_is_hit.monthly_soft: Odds fetch is throttled automatically by modulus-based skip policy
what_happens_when_cap_is_hit.monthly_hard: Odds fetch is denied with hard-stop warning

dashboard_dependency_check.dashboard_budget_health_visibility: Not added in this step; runtime budget file and logs provide health visibility.

notes: Odds API remains verification-only and non-streaming.
Live dashboard motion remains driven by local/live state, not Odds API refresh.
